text: Path-traversal containment for --project and artifact id (assertSafeSegment in paths.ts; validate id in store.ts; refuse colliding relocate). Plan: .ralph/audit-plans/001-path-containment.md
Roll back the supersede mutation on a failed create (pre-flight parent_prd read + restore superseded artifact in catch). Plan: .ralph/audit-plans/002-supersede-rollback.md
Collision-safe ID allocation (exclusive 'wx' write + bounded retry in createArtifact). Plan: .ralph/audit-plans/003-nextid-race.md
Guard the qmd JSON.parse -> QmdError + export & unit-test parseQmdResults. Plan: .ralph/audit-plans/004-qmd-parse-hardening.md
Treat null frontmatter value as absent in validate (coalesce null->undefined). Plan: .ralph/audit-plans/005-null-field-validate.md
Consolidate project resolution (projectPath() at 9 sites; converge fmt/sync onto loadProjectConfig+projectErrorMessage+exit-10). Plan: .ralph/audit-plans/006-project-resolution-consolidation.md
Remove de-workflow dead code (test_command flag/field/usage, appendField+AppendFieldInput+test, research.sources, js-yaml.d.ts). Plan: .ralph/audit-plans/007-deworkflow-dead-code.md
Fix the test script footgun (package.json: bun test -> bun test tests/). Plan: .ralph/audit-plans/008-test-script-footgun.md
